div1.entryFree: Rump-fed, according to Steevens, == fed on offals (flaps, kidneys, rumps, and other scraps, having been among the low perquisites of the kitchen given away to the poor); more probably, according to Nares, == fat-bottomed, fed or fattened in the rump: aroint thee, witch! the r. ronyon cries, Mcb. I, 3, 6.*
